title: eupatorium oinopolepis
intro: Eupatorium oinopolepis is a plant species in the sunflower family that belongs to the genus Eupatorium, commonly known as boneset. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Eupatorium oinopolepis include its ability to relieve fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate headaches. Eupatorium oinopolepis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
